title.en: You got this! 할 수 있어!
title.ko: 할 수 있어! 넌 해낼 거야!

description.en: When you want to give courage to a friend who is nervous about a new challenge! Practice sending a powerful message of support with 할 수 있어 and 넌 해낼 거야.
description.ko: 새로운 도전을 앞두고 긴장한 친구에게 용기를 주고 싶을 때! 할 수 있어와 넌 해낼 거야를 사용해 강력한 응원의 메시지를 전해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Encouragement. Confidence. Support. Challenge. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 저 내일 드디어 운전면허 도로 주행 시험을 봐요.
content.translation: John. I'm finally taking my driver's license road test tomorrow.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 연습은 많이 했는데 너무 떨려서 실수할까 봐 걱정이에요.
content.translation: I practiced a lot. but I'm so nervous that I'm worried I'll make a mistake.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. don't worry! You got this! 할 수 있어!
content.translation: Mina. don't worry! You got this! You can do it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 연습할 때 보니까 정말 잘하던데요?
content.translation: I saw you practicing and you were really good!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 정말 그럴까요? 시험관 앞에만 서면 머릿속이 하얘질 것 같아서요.
content.translation: Do you really think so? I feel like my mind will go blank as soon as I stand in front of the examiner.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 잘할 수 있어. 스스로를 믿어봐요. 넌 해낼 거야!
content.translation: You'll do great. Trust yourself. I guarantee it. You're going to make it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 할 수 있어. This is the classic "You can do it." right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방의 능력을 믿고 가능성을 열어주는 가장 대중적인 응원 표현이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It's the most popular encouraging expression that shows you trust someone's ability and open up possibilities.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 짧지만 아주 힘이 되는 말이죠.
content.translation: It's short but very powerful.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방의 능력을 믿고 가능성을 열어주는 가장 대중적인 응원 표현이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It's the most popular encouraging expression that shows you trust someone's ability and open up possibilities.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 할 수 있어.
content.translation: You can do it.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 잘할 수 있어 라는 표현은 단순히 성공 여부를 떠나서 그 과정을 훌륭하게 수행할 거라고 격려할 때 써요.
content.translation: And the expression 'Jal-hal-su it-eo' is used to encourage someone that they will perform the process excellently. regardless of just success or failure.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 잘할 수 있어.
content.translation: You'll do well.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What about 넌 해낼 거야.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이 표현은 결과에 대한 확신을 줄 때 써요.
content.translation: This expression is used to give confidence in the result.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "너는 결국 성공할 거야" 라는 강한 믿음이 담겨 있어서 듣는 사람에게 정말 큰 용기를 준답니다.
content.translation: It carries a strong belief that "you will eventually succeed." so it gives the listener great courage.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm about to go on stage for a big talent show to play the guitar. and my hands are shaking.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 이제 곧 무대에 올라갈 시간이에요! 기타 준비는 다 됐죠?
content.translation: John. it's almost time to go on stage! Is the guitar ready?

content.speaker: John
content.text: My hands are so cold. Mina. What if I forget the chords?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 에이. 존답지 않게 왜 이래요! 지금까지 수없이 연습했잖아요. 할 수 있어!
content.translation: Hey. why are you being like this? It's not like you! You've practiced countless times. You can do it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Phew... Okay. I can do this. I hope I don't mess up.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 걱정 마요. 존은 무대 체질이잖아요! 잘할 수 있어요. 관객들은 존의 연주를 좋아할 거예요.
content.translation: Don't worry. You're a natural on stage! You'll do great. The audience will love your playing. You're going to make it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Thanks. Mina! I'm going in!

content.speaker: John
content.text: A little bit of encouragement can make a huge difference.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 누군가 도전을 앞두고 불안해할 때 오늘 배운 표현들로 따뜻한 에너지를 전해 보세요!
content.translation: Right. When someone is anxious before a challenge. send them warm energy with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "encouraging" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 할 수 있어! You got this!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 잘할 수 있어! You'll do great!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 넌 해낼 거야! You're going to make it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 겁내지 마! Don't be afraid!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너만 믿어! I believe in you!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 새로운 일을 시작한다면 스스로에게 말해 보세요. 난 할 수 있어!
content.translation: If you are starting something new today. try saying it to yourself. I can do it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 당신의 능력을 믿으세요. (Believe in your ability.)
새로운 도전은 언제나 설레는 일이에요. (A new challenge is always an exciting thing.)
존이 실력 하나는 정말 보증해요. (John really guarantees the skill.)
연습을 많이 해서 자신감이 생겼어요. (I gained confidence because I practiced a lot.)
친구의 응원이 큰 용기가 되었어요. (My friend's support was a great courage.)
이번에는 성공할 거라는 확신이 있어요. (I have confidence that I will succeed this time.)
